hero_heading: A three-month container for meaningful change
hero_description: Personalized, collaborative, and tailored entirely to you.
container_heading: Designed for women ready to go deeper
container_para1: This is a personalized three-month container for women who want focused support and meaningful internal change. Rather than a single session approach, this container allows time to explore patterns, build awareness, and integrate new ways of relating to yourself.
container_para2: Much of our behavior, emotional responses, and beliefs are shaped by the subconscious mind — storing memories, learned patterns, protective responses, and internal narratives formed throughout life. When we work with the subconscious directly, lasting change becomes more possible.
container_para3: Sessions take place twice per month and last approximately 60-75 minutes. Each session is guided by what is present and what will be most supportive for your process.

pillars.title: Support Your Mind
pillars.description: Hypnosis and meditation help access the subconscious mind where beliefs, emotional memories, and internal patterns are stored. These practices allow us to bring awareness to unconscious patterns and create space for new perspectives and internal shifts.

pillars.title: Support Your Body
pillars.description: Breathwork and Reiki support the body's nervous system and energetic balance. These practices help release stored tension and invite the body into a more regulated and restorative state.

pillars.title: Support Your Soul
pillars.description: Intuitive guidance and coaching may be included when appropriate — offering intuitive reflection and insight that support a deeper understanding of your personal path and inner experience.

for_heading: This container is designed for women who are ready to explore themselves more deeply and want consistent support through that process.
for_items: You sense there are patterns at a deeper level you haven't been able to shift on your own
You want support that goes beyond talk — working with body, mind, and deeper self
You're ready for consistent, structured support over time
You value an approach that integrates both scientific and spiritual perspectives
You're committed to your own process and willing to do the inner work
booking_description: A free 30-minute conversation to explore whether this work is right for you. No commitment required — just an honest conversation about where you are and where you want to go.
